title: Project Management Tools Suite
problemStatement: Excel-based project controls created fragmented data, weak traceability, and low user adoption across teams.
solution: Replaced legacy workflows with a connected suite of Zoho Creator tools, AI-assisted workflows, branded PDF exports, and structured project controls including communiques, communication matrix, technical query tracking, comment resolution, project summaries, lessons learned, and complaint management with SLA awareness.
impact: Centralized operational data, improved accountability, accelerated issue resolution, and aligned teams around standardized project tracking.
leadershipValue: Shifted project governance from isolated documents to a more dependable operating system with clearer ownership and repeatable control points.

interactionFiles.label: Interactive case brief
interactionFiles.description: Explore how fragmented delivery workflows were converted into a governed digital toolkit.
